task_completion.description: Open both the DAPI and signal images in the image analysis software (Fiji/ImageJ).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Fiji/ImageJ open with both 'cell_dapi.tif' and 'cell_signal.tif' loaded in image windows.

task_completion.description: Define a nuclear Region of Interest (ROI) based on the DAPI image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A selection outline (typically yellow) around the central bright elliptical region in the DAPI image, and/or an entry representing the nucleus in the ROI Manager.

task_completion.description: Define a cytoplasmic ROI consisting of a 15-pixel band surrounding the nucleus that excludes the nuclear area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ring-shaped selection outline (band) visible on the image or in the ROI Manager. It should clearly surround the nucleus while leaving the inner nuclear area unselected (e.g., created via Enlarge and Make Band or XOR operations).

task_completion.description: Measure the Mean Gray Values of the protein signal within both the nuclear and cytoplasmic ROIs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Results' window in Fiji showing measurements (specifically 'Mean') for at least two regions (nucleus and cytoplasm) taken on the 'cell_signal.tif' image.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated N/C ratio to ratio_report.txt and export the ROIs to rois.zip in the specified results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer, terminal, or save dialogs showing the creation or existence of 'ratio_report.txt' and 'rois.zip' in the '~/Fiji_Data/results/translocation/' directory. A text editor or terminal output might also show the calculated ratio (around 0.56).

integrity.description: The agent used the Fiji/ImageJ GUI to perform the image analysis rather than bypassing it with a background script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of Fiji/ImageJ interface elements, ROI Manager, and Results table in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The ROIs were genuinely derived from the image data and morphological operations, not arbitrarily drawn.
integrity.visual_evidence: The nuclear ROI should tightly fit the central bright ellipse, and the cytoplasmic ROI should be a uniform band around it, rather than rough, manually drawn polygons or generic rectangles.

integrity.description: The agent calculated the ratio based on actual measurements rather than guessing or hardcoding a value.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final ratio in the report should mathematically correspond to the Mean values shown in the Fiji Results window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The images are synthetic 512x512 pixel images. The DAPI image contains a bright central elliptical nucleus (intensity ~200). The signal image contains a dimmer nucleus (intensity ~100) surrounded by a brighter ring-shaped cytoplasm (intensity ~180). The expected N/C ratio is approximately 0.56 (100/180). The cytoplasm ROI must be exactly a 15-pixel band surrounding the nucleus, excluding the nucleus itself. Output paths are ~/Fiji_Data/results/translocation/ratio_report.txt and ~/Fiji_Data/results/translocation/rois.zip.
